name: Elvis Presley's Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the well-scrubbed potatoes in a 3-quart saucepan. Cover with cold water and bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook until potatoes are very soft, about 20-30 minutes.
3. Drain and when cool enough to handle, peel the potatoes.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the peeled potatoes, butter, brown sugar, and nutmeg. Using a potato masher, cream the potatoes until very smooth.
5. In a small bowl, beat the eggs, 1 cup evaporated milk, and vanilla together.
6. Beat this egg mixture into the potatoes. Mix thoroughly.
7. Pour into the prepared pie crust and drizzle the remaining 1/4 cup of milk on top.
8. Bake for 15 minutes in a preheated 450°F oven. Turn off the heat and continue baking at 325°F for 30 minutes or more until the filling is set.
